backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the RAY INFOTECH MLM platform, implementing user profile management, member registration, MLM tree/matrix positioning, commission calculation, and role-based access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of a data recovery status banner in AdminPanel.tsx that shows member count, an empty-state warning, and a Reload Members button.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary file describing the purpose and key changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'RAY INFOTECH MLM' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes, wraps the app in QueryClient and ThemeProvider, and shows a full-screen loading spinner while the Internet Identity session is being restored.
frontend/src/components/AddMemberForm.ts: Admin form component for registering a new MLM member with name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID fields, displaying a success state with the assigned member ID on completion.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Renders a 9-level MLM commission breakdown table showing members, rates, earned commissions, and max potential commissions per level, with locked/unlocked status indicators.
Displays a summary card of a member's total earned vs. potential earnings across all 9 MLM levels, including joining fee refund eligibility status.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links for Home, Dashboard, Register Member, and Admin, plus login/logout controls using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary tree of MLM downline members up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with name, ID, active status, and fee payment status.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Fetches all members and computes platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) displayed as a grid of summary cards.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to set up their profile (name and contact info) before using the MLM platform, shown only when no existing profile is found.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: A card component that displays a member's recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active with live countdown) and progress toward recruiting 3 direct downlines within a 3-day window.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, admin roles, member lists, and MLM-related operations, all gated on actor and identity readiness.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for the Ray Infotech deep navy and gold brand theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that requires Internet Identity authentication, displaying member management tools including listing, adding, deleting members, marking fees paid, and checking membership statuses alongside platform statistics.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing a searchable member selector with matrix tree visualization, earnings summary, commission history, and recruitment deadline card; performs BFS traversal to build downline levels per member.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing/home page displaying the platform's hero section, commission structure (levels 1–9 with decreasing percentages), and navigation CTAs for authenticated and unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication and redirects users to /admin or /dashboard based on their fetched role, showing loading states during session restoration.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration page with a form for name, mobile, email, and sponsor ID; validates inputs, verifies the sponsor exists, submits registration, and displays the resulting member ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for handling nanosecond-precision backend timestamps, including formatting dates, computing deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those values using sessionStorage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (navy, gold), fonts, shadows, border radii, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the RAY INFOTECH MLM app, tracking existing features, a pending backend fix request to preserve member data across upgrades, and a known issue of missing members data after deployment.
